module.title: SAP TM Reporting, Analytics & Performance Management

topic.title: SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Integration for SAP TM

learningObjectives.title: Understand SAC integration role
learningObjectives.description: Explain SAC as strategic analytics extension over SAP TM operational reporting.

learningObjectives.title: Understand SAC capabilities
learningObjectives.description: Describe dashboards, predictive analytics, planning, drill-down, and mobile access.

learningObjectives.title: Understand enterprise analytics value
learningObjectives.description: Clarify combining logistics, finance, and sales data for executive decisions.

sections.title: SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Integration for SAP TM

sections.content: SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) extends SAP Transportation Management by providing advanced dashboards, interactive visualizations, predictive analytics and executive reporting. While SAP TM provides operational reports, SAC combines transportation data with finance, sales and supply chain information to deliver enterprise-wide business insights.

sections.title: Key Concept
sections.content: SAP TM manages transportation operations, whereas SAP Analytics Cloud transforms transportation data into strategic business intelligence.

sections.title: SAP TM to SAC Analytics Flow

sections.content: A logistics director uses SAP Analytics Cloud to analyze transportation costs across multiple countries. The dashboard predicts increasing freight costs in one region due to seasonal demand, allowing management to negotiate carrier contracts before costs rise.

sections.title: SAP TM Reports vs SAP Analytics Cloud
Best Practice
sections.content: Combine SAP TM operational data with finance, sales and procurement information in SAP Analytics Cloud to gain a complete view of supply chain performance.

sections.title: Real Project Example
sections.content: A multinational manufacturing company integrated SAP TM with SAP Analytics Cloud to monitor transportation costs globally. Predictive dashboards helped reduce annual freight expenses by identifying high-cost transportation lanes before budget overruns occurred.

sections.title: Interview Tip
sections.content: SAP Analytics Cloud is primarily used for dashboards, predictive analytics, planning and executive reporting—not for transportation execution.

sections.title: Common Mistake
sections.content: SAP Analytics Cloud complements SAP TM but does not replace its operational reporting or transportation management capabilities.

items: SAP Analytics Cloud provides advanced analytics for SAP TM.
SAC supports dashboards, predictive analytics and planning.
Transportation data can be combined with enterprise business data.
SAC enables executive-level reporting and strategic decisions.
SAP TM manages operations, while SAC provides business intelligence.
